title: Add M3 needs owner stores and urgency indexes
summary: Add deterministic need state and derived urgency indexes for hunger, rest, comfort, social and safety.
acceptance: Need state uses 0-1000 integer lanes for hunger rest comfort social and safety with deterministic scheduled phase-staggered updates
Urgency projections and WorkOffer inputs are derived from owner state and versioned dirty updates rather than authoritative caches
Pawn thinking queries bounded indexed candidate lanes and never scans all actors all needs all entities or the full map
Need changes produce structured reason data for later rest food mood and scenario explanations
Focused tests cover deterministic update cadence clamps index rebuild and no global scan behavior

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Implemented deterministic M3 NeedStore, NeedUrgencyIndex, structured reason traces, focused tests, and docs; required gates and pnpm quality pass

changes_requested: High: NeedStore.processScheduledUpdates restarts each phase at the head after budget exhaustion, so later lanes in a phase can starve and scheduled need updates are not fair/bounded-progress. Medium: manual NeedUrgencyIndex.markDirty integration needs an explicit contract or safer helper so owner mutations cannot silently leave stale urgency rows.
Repaired scheduled need phase cursor starvation and added explicit NeedUrgencyIndex mutation dirty helper contract; required gates and pnpm quality pass

verified: No blocking findings after repair; scheduled phase cursors make budgeted need updates progress without starvation, explicit mutation dirty helpers and scheduled NeedDirtySink keep urgency rows stale-rejected until refreshed, and required gates pass.

Owner integration rechecked WM-0048 after reviewer verification and after merging current main with WM-0049; acknowledged review approval and confirmed typecheck, focused needs+environment vitest, task status, and diff check pass.

objective: Implement the first M3 life-state owner store surface without job behavior or UI authority.
forbiddenPaths: rest sleep eating medical mood relationship or weather implementation beyond integration hooks approved by ADR-0008
global scan or unversioned cache workaround
benchmarkImpact: Records need update counts dirty backlog urgency index sizes candidate caps and scheduled system cost; baseline updates wait for WM-0059.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before owner-store or index-boundary changes.
rollbackModel: Revert needs store/index code tests docs and report while preserving M2 work/logistics behavior.
ownerGate: Do not add behavior that belongs to rest food medical mood or relationships
Use integer lanes and scheduled phase staggering
Keep derived indexes rebuildable from owner stores
Block on any need for public save schema protocol dependency or UI authority changes

sparkEligibility.reason: Deterministic simulation owner-store and indexed thinking work is not suitable for Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings after repair; scheduled phase cursors make budgeted need updates progress without starvation, explicit mutation dirty helpers and scheduled NeedDirtySink keep urgency rows stale-rejected until refreshed, and required gates pass.

integration.summary: Owner integration rechecked WM-0048 after reviewer verification and after merging current main with WM-0049; acknowledged review approval and confirmed typecheck, focused needs+environment vitest, task status, and diff check pass.
